title: Badlands Pyramids
description: Badlands pyramid dungeons with procedurally generated crypts, new loot, recipes, a new well, and plenty of chambers.
body:
This is a datapack for Minecraft that adds badlands pyramids to your Minecraft world. Download this pack now and add it to your world, find a badlands biome, and look for a pyramid!

Report any bugs in the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/jmVGMvtrcd)!

![Heaps of hits!](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/badlandspyramid)
![The Badlands Pyramids logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2d3ddaf335ba341ed93566b0e5038b3ddf72774_0.webp)

# **ADVANCEMENTS**
- The advancement tab that these advancements are in gets unlocked after entering a Badlands biome
- Tomb Raider: This advancement triggers when entering a Badlands Pyramid
- Wonders of the World: This advancement triggers after entering the Desert, Jungle, and Badlands Pyramids
- Well, Well, Well: This advancement triggers when entering the vicinity of a rare Badlands Well
- Secret Cow Level: Trigger a certain trap. (rare)

![An advancements tree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00ceed0f3191e49dd2cbfaf01e2a66b36ea86b3c.png)

# **CRAFTING RECIPE**
- Adds a crafting recipe for Wither Skeleton Skulls
- See recipe below (can use coal or charcoal)

![A crafting recipe for a Wither Skeleton Skull. It's a regular Skeleton Skull in the middle, surrounded by coal, with crying obsidian in the corners.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a0141c43c579c370a657c4dfc71d0587ef22383_0.webp)

# **BADLANDS WELL**
- A small well with three pots and a waterlogged loot chest
- Does nothing, similar to Desert Wells.

![A small well](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc11e4dca7c1234002df565b5240eb277774d57c_0.webp)

# **BADLANDS PYRAMID**
- At first it may seem like a small pyramid, but when you dig below, it will have many secrets to find!
- It will present you with a small trap and then going straight ahead will lead you to the altar, an altar area with a design.
- There will also be other hallways leading to different variated rooms.
- It also has stairwells leading downwards, deeper into the depths, with more rooms to find!

![Someone fighting Husks coming from a spawner, struggling to survive, while there are some pots and a big loot chest next to them](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3393b2a65bec2a28251eb3d9dd4b239b7fa823e_0.webp)
